name: terminal
title: Terminal
description: A dark-first developer blog: deep blue-charcoal, amber CRT phosphor accent, mono chrome over a humanist reading column. The signature is the code — framed blocks with a language badge, copy button, and a changelog-style archive.

tokens.--font-mono: the terminal voice — masthead, nav, meta lines, dates, code
tokens.--font-sans: body prose and headings (humanist, comfortable for essays)
tokens.--text-xs: badges, keyboard hints, the smallest labels
tokens.--text-s: meta lines, nav, archive dates, code
tokens.--text-l: section headings and archive entry titles
tokens.--color-bg: page background — deep blue-charcoal, not black
tokens.--color-surface: raised panels: TOC, archive hover, 404 shell
tokens.--color-accent: amber phosphor — links, focus rings, the code frame edge
tokens.--color-accent-wash: inline code and selection tint (translucent amber)
tokens.--color-code-bg: code block background (stays dark in both schemes)
tokens.--color-code-muted: code bar labels and the copy button
tokens.--measure: maximum width of the reading column
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for code frames and panels
